## Summary

## Public Boundary Check

- [ ] This does not require MapleBridge production code.
- [ ] This does not include customer, buyer, or supplier private data.
- [ ] This does not expose crawler sources, ranking thresholds, credentials, or private operational details.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run demo`
- [ ] `npm run check:json`
- [ ] Documentation links checked
